message:
Fix checksums.yml: add integration triggers, fix duplicate processing

Two bugs fixed:

1. Workflow trigger paths now include 'integrations/**/*.md'
   - Previously only ACIP_*.md changes triggered checksum updates
   - Now integration file changes also trigger the workflow
   - Ensures manifest stays in sync with all tracked files

2. Fixed duplicate file processing in integration loop
   - Old: 'integrations/*/SECURITY.md integrations/*/*.md'
   - New: 'integrations/*/*.md'
   - The old pattern matched SECURITY.md twice (once explicitly,
     once via *.md glob), causing duplicate JSON entries
   - Single glob pattern matches all .md files without duplicates

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,6 +5,7 @@ on:
     branches: [main]
     paths:
       - 'ACIP_*.md'
+      - 'integrations/**/*.md'
   release:
     types: [published]
   workflow_dispatch:
@@ -88,8 +89,8 @@ jobs:
           INTEGRATIONS_JSON="["
           FIRST_INT=true
 
-          # Process integration files
-          for intfile in integrations/*/SECURITY.md integrations/*/*.md; do
+          # Process integration files (all .md files in integration directories)
+          for intfile in integrations/*/*.md; do
             if [ -f "$intfile" ]; then
               echo "Processing integration: $intfile"
